chat-clear-cache-confirm: Do you really want to clear chat cache? Please use this feature only when chat system is not working properly.
chat-input-help-text: Type your message in the textbox and press Send to send your message. Markdown is supported. If you want to mention someone, use #mention# followed by their UID and end with a #. Also, or just click their username to quick mention.
chat-mod-terminal-description: A moderation-themed terminal skin that changes both ChatNet bubbles and profile pages.
mention-this-user-in-your-message: Mention this user in your message
reply-here-maximum-is-512-words-markdown: Reply here (maximum is 512 words, markdown supported)
chat-reply-target-not-found: The message you are replying to could not be found
chat-reply-target-wrong-channel: Cannot reply to a message from another channel
